# AffixDefinition.Name property

Localized affix display name (sibling label `Name`; the raw authored fragment, e.g. `"Bear Clan Berserker's"`, `"of Limitless Rage"`, `"Devilish"`), or Empty when the affix has no sibling `Name` (system/internal affixes). The consumer owns any `"Aspect …"` composition.

```csharp
public string Name { get; }
```
